questionHtml: After time t the rod makes an angle θ with the horizontal. Outline why the equation θ = 1 2 α t 2  cannot be used to find the time it takes θ to become  π 2 (that is for the rod to become vertical for the first time).
markschemeHtml:
the equation can be applied only when the angular acceleration is constant ✔

any reasonable argument that explains torque is not constant, giving non constant acceleration ✔
